title: End-to-end user journey through feedback submission, general app settings (licenses and privacy policy), and notifications configuration
feature: Poly Studio App - Main Menu & Settings
scenario: As a guest user with no device connected, navigate the main menu to submit feedback, browse general settings (licenses and privacy policy), and configure notifications and device alerts.
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio app on your mobile device (Android/iOS).
2. Complete the onboarding process as a guest user (no device connected).
3. Navigate to the main menu by tapping the menu icon (hamburger icon or equivalent).
4. From the main menu, select 'Feedback' to access the feedback submission page.
5. Submit feedback (or browse the feedback page).
7. Select 'General Settings' from the main menu.
8. Within General Settings, tap on 'Licenses' to view license information.
10. Tap on 'Privacy Policy' to view the privacy policy.
11. Return to General Settings, then go back to the main menu.
12. Navigate to 'Notifications' or 'Notifications Configuration' from the main menu.
13. Configure notification preferences (e.g., enable/disable device alerts, push notifications, etc.).
14. Save or apply the notification settings.
expected: User can successfully navigate through the entire journey: access feedback page, view licenses and privacy policy in general settings, and configure notifications/device alerts without errors.
